recipe.title: Red cabbage
recipe.description: Celebrating the humble red cabbage, this is a delicious, braised red cabbage recipe from Jamie Oliver’s Christmas Cookbook – enjoy it hot or cold.

ingredients.name: rashers of higher-welfare smoked streaky bacon

steps.descr: Click away any tatty outer leaves from your cabbage,...
steps.instructions: Click away any tatty outer leaves from your cabbage, trim off the base, cut the cabbage into wedges, then finely slice it and put aside.

on_enter.say: Click away any tatty outer leaves from your cabbage, trim off the base, cut the cabbage into wedges, then finely slice it and put aside.

steps.descr: Finely slice the bacon and place in a large casserole...
steps.instructions: Finely slice the bacon and place in a large casserole pan on a medium heat with 1 tablespoon of oil. Leave it to crisp up while you peel, core and dice the apples.

on_enter.say: Finely slice the bacon and place in a large casserole pan on a medium heat with 1 tablespoon of oil. Leave it to crisp up while you peel, core and dice the apples.

steps.descr: When the bacon is crispy, strip the rosemary leaves into...
steps.instructions: When the bacon is crispy, strip the rosemary leaves into the pan, stir for 1 minute, then use a slotted spoon to remove the bacon and rosemary to a plate, leaving the smoky bacon fat behind.

on_enter.say: When the bacon is crispy, strip the rosemary leaves into the pan, stir for 1 minute, then use a slotted spoon to remove the bacon and rosemary to a plate, leaving the smoky bacon fat behind.

steps.descr: Add the fennel seeds and diced apples to the pan, then...
steps.instructions: Add the fennel seeds and diced apples to the pan, then tear in the prunes, removing any stones. Stir and fry for 2 minutes, then finely grate in the clementine zest and squeeze in the juice.

on_enter.say: Add the fennel seeds and diced apples to the pan, then tear in the prunes, removing any stones. Stir and fry for 2 minutes, then finely grate in the clementine zest and squeeze in the juice.

steps.descr: Add the vinegar, cabbage and a pinch of sea salt and...
steps.instructions: Add the vinegar, cabbage and a pinch of sea salt and black pepper.

on_enter.say: Add the vinegar, cabbage and a pinch of sea salt and black pepper.

steps.descr: Cook with a lid ajar on a low heat for 20 to 25 minutes,...
steps.instructions: Cook with a lid ajar on a low heat for 20 to 25 minutes, or until cooked through and a pleasure to eat, stirring well every 5 minutes to help intensify and mix up the flavours.

on_enter.say: Cook with a lid ajar on a low heat for 20 to 25 minutes, or until cooked through and a pleasure to eat, stirring well every 5 minutes to help intensify and mix up the flavours.

steps.descr: Serve sprinkled with the crispy bacon and rosemary leaves
steps.instructions: Serve sprinkled with the crispy bacon and rosemary leaves.

on_enter.say: Serve sprinkled with the crispy bacon and rosemary leaves.
